caption: Final validation synthesis dashboard combining POSet incomparability, multi-indicator validation support, and GDP recovery advantage. The figure summarizes validation evidence without converting the POSet into a scalar index.

Comparison between GDP recovery validation and broader multi-indicator validation. Frontier countries show faster recovery on average and outperform non-frontier countries on most macro validation indicators.
Direction-aligned frontier advantage by macro validation indicator. Positive values mean frontier countries perform better than non-frontier countries on the given post-shock outcome.
Mismatch cases by validation layer and shock. These cases are expected in a multidimensional framework and indicate where post-shock outcomes diverge from structural POSet position.
Relationship between POSet incomparability and validation support. High incomparability shows why a scalar ranking would hide structural trade-offs.
